Best Car Batteries in Gajwel, Siddipet & Medak

Royal Batteries is the leading car battery shop in Gajwel, serving Siddipet district and Medak district with genuine Exide and Amaron car batteries since 2005. As an Exide CARE Authorized Dealer, every battery we sell carries full manufacturer warranty and genuine quality assurance.

Car Battery Brands We Stock

Exide Mileage

Hatchbacks & Sedans

Best for small to mid-sized cars (Maruti Alto, Swift, i10). Price: ₹2,800–₹4,200. 24-month replacement warranty.

Exide Matrix Pro

SUVs & MUVs

Heavy-duty for SUVs and MUVs (Creta, Scorpio, Innova). Price: ₹5,000–₹7,500. Enhanced vibration resistance.

Amaron BXLife

All car types

Zero-maintenance sealed battery with 60-month warranty. Perfect for Telangana's hot summers. Price: ₹3,200–₹8,000.

Amaron FreshPack

Sedans & Hatchbacks

Pre-charged and sealed for maximum shelf life. Ready to install. Price: ₹3,500–₹6,000.

Powerzone

Budget option

Value-for-money batteries for budget-conscious customers. Good performance for city driving.

Popular Car Models We Service

Maruti AltoMaruti SwiftHyundai i10Hyundai i20Honda CityHonda AmazeTata NexonMahindra BoleroToyota InnovaToyota FortunerRenault KwidNissan MicraKia SeltosHyundai CretaScorpio-NTata Punch

Our Car Battery Service Process

  1. Free diagnosis: We test your current battery and confirm if replacement is needed.
  2. Right battery selection: We find the correct specification (AH, CCA) for your vehicle model.
  3. Transparent pricing: You know the final price before we proceed — no hidden costs.
  4. Fast fitting: Car battery replacement takes 15–30 minutes at our Gajwel showroom.
  5. Warranty documentation: Warranty card issued with purchase date and battery number.

Get a Car Battery Quote

Tell us your vehicle model and we'll give you the exact price for the right battery.

FAQ

Car Battery FAQs — Royal Batteries Gajwel

Which car battery brands do you stock in Gajwel?
We stock Exide (Mileage, Matrix Pro, Exceed), Amaron (BXLife, Hi-Life, FreshPack), and Powerzone for all car models including Maruti Alto, Swift, Hyundai i10/i20, Honda City, Tata Nexon, Mahindra Scorpio, and SUVs.
How much does a car battery cost at Royal Batteries?
Car battery prices start from ₹2,800 for small hatchbacks (Maruti Alto, Hyundai Eon) up to ₹8,500 for large SUVs (Fortuner, Innova). Price includes free installation and old battery exchange. Call for exact model pricing.
Do you provide warranty on car batteries?
Yes. All Exide batteries come with 18–42 months warranty (replacement + pro-rata). Amaron BXLife comes with up to 60 months total warranty. Warranty cards are given at the time of purchase.
Can you fit a car battery at my location?
Yes! If you are within 50 km of Gajwel, we deliver and fit the battery at your home, office, or roadside. No need to tow your vehicle. Call 9397617823 for same-day service.
How long does a car battery last in Gajwel's hot climate?
In Telangana's hot climate, car batteries typically last 2.5–4 years. Proper maintenance (cleaning terminals, maintaining electrolyte level in summer) can extend life significantly. We offer free battery health checks to assess your current battery.

Need a Car Battery Today?

Walk in or call us — same-day fitting at our Gajwel showroom or doorstep delivery across Siddipet & Medak.
